data.title: Hyperscale Data (NYSE: GPUS) reduces $30M debt year-to-date, boosting AI and Bitcoin expansion plans.
data.description: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE: GPUS) has experienced a notable increase in its stock price after achieving a key financial accomplishment. The company has successfully decreased its outstanding non-affiliated debt by $30 million year-to-date. This strategic move not only improves Hyperscale Data's financial position but also enhances its ability to adapt to different financial situations. The reduced debt levels will allow for faster growth, especially in its primary sectors of artificial intelligence (AI) and Bitcoin data hosting based in Michigan. These operations are managed by its subsidiary, Alliance Cloud Services, LLC (ACS). The reduction in debt was made possible through a combination of debt repayments and conversions, significantly boosting the company's available funds and setting the stage for further expansion.

data.title: NSF and Impossible Foods certify Impossible® Beef and Burger as first plant-based meats in NSF Certified for Sport program.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, NSF and Impossible Foods have revealed that Impossible Beef and Impossible Burger have received the NSF Certified for Sport® designation, a groundbreaking achievement for any plant-based meat or fresh food item in the program's history. This certification confirms that Impossible Foods' plant-based beef and burger products are beneficial for athletic lifestyles, offering delicious flavor and impressive nutrition. This marks the first time for a plant-based meat or fresh food product to receive this certification.

data.title: Shake Shack to announce Q3 2025 financial results on 10/30/25 with conference call at 8am ET. CEO and CFO hosting call. Phone dial: (877) 407-0792.
data.description: Shake Shack Inc. (NYSE: SHAK) is set to announce its third quarter 2025 financial results on October 30, 2025, prior to the market's opening. The company will hold a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET, featuring Rob Lynch, CEO, and Katie Fogertey, CFO. To participate, individuals can join the call at (877) 407-0792.

data.title: Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ) will report Q3 2025 financial results on Oct. 30, 2025 with a pre-recorded session at 6:30 am ET and live webcast Q&A at 9:30 am ET.
data.description: Hanover, Pennsylvania – Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ), a prominent U.S. producer of branded Salty Snacks and a growing small-cap equity, declared intentions to reveal its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2025 on Thursday, October 30, 2025. The report will be released at 6:30 a.m. Eastern Time, including a press release, pre-recorded comments from management, and a slide presentation. Furthermore, a live webcast Q&A session with analysts is scheduled for 9:30 a.m.

data.title: Luxembourg SWF invests 1% of $900M fund, approx $9M in Bitcoin ETFs.
data.description: Luxembourg's national investment fund has decided to invest approximately 1% of its portfolio, valued at around $900 million, into Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), amounting to roughly $9 million.

data.title: Perfect Corp. partners with Erborian for 'Find Your Match' TikTok campaign using virtual try-on.
data.description: Perfect Corp. has joined forces with Erborian to introduce the "Find Your Match" experience featuring the latest CC Crème. Erborian's new CC Crème, a revitalized version of the popular current CC Crème, offers a lightweight feel and radiant look with added skincare advantages. This collaboration showcases Perfect Corp.'s AI and AR technology solutions and Erborian's innovative beauty product, emphasizing a seamless blend of technology and skincare. Perfect Corp. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PERF.

data.title: MarineMax promotes Charles Cashman to drive yacht sales growth globally as Senior VP of Global Yacht Sales. MarineMax is the world's largest boat and yacht retailer (NYSE: HZO).
data.description: In OLDSMAR, Florida, MarineMax, Inc. (NYSE: HZO) revealed that Charles A. Cashman, the Chief Revenue Officer, is transitioning to Senior Vice President of Global Yacht Sales within the Company. With MarineMax being the largest recreational boat and yacht retailer globally, Cashman will focus on enhancing growth in the yacht and superyacht divisions. His new role will involve overseeing yacht sales and global superyacht operations.

data.title: ECD Automotive Design reveals first custom Porsche build, Project Gravette, adding to their bespoke lineup.
data.description: Today, ECD Automotive Design unveiled their newest custom build, marking their first collaboration with Porsche on Project Gravette. The project includes a bespoke design and features a unique transformation for the luxury brand. This marks a significant milestone for ECD, as they continue to expand their portfolio of bespoke builds.

data.title: NKGen Biotech (OTC: NKGN) addresses confusion on OTC Expert Market trading status with displayed $0.00 stock price.
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, on October 9, 2025, NKGen Biotech, Inc. (OTC: NKGN) addressed queries from shareholders about its trading status on the OTC Expert Market and the appearance of a $0.00 value for its Common Stock on some financial platforms. NKGen is a biotech company dedicated to advancing autologous and allogeneic natural killer ("NK") cell therapies. The stock in question has a par value of $0.0001 per share.

data.title: Deep Sky plans to build 500,000 tonne carbon removal facility in Manitoba, Canada, investing $500 million in the region.
data.description: Deep Sky, a pioneer in tech-agnostic carbon removal project development, has chosen Manitoba as the site for their upcoming commercial carbon removal facility. The investment in this facility is expected to benefit the region with an estimated $500 million. This selection marks a significant milestone for Deep Sky and the region of Manitoba, solidifying their position as a key player in the carbon removal industry. The facility's establishment is set to pave the way for innovative advancements in sustainable practices and environmental conservation.

data.title: $463M financing secured by Eolian & Natixis for Texas battery storage site with 400MW/1.8GWh capacity, addressing grid reliability.
data.description: In response to Governor Abbott's request for increased reliability on the Texas grid, Padua Complex in Burlingame, California will be enhancing its capacity by adding 400 MW and 1.8 GWh upon completion. Eolian, L.P. has secured a $463 million financing package to fund this project.

data.title: 30+ provider groups have adopted Nabla's ambient AI through athenahealth, benefiting 160,000 care providers.
data.description: A healthcare technology company, Athenahealth, is expanding its reach to over 160,000 healthcare providers throughout the country by introducing new innovations via the athenahealth® Marketplace. This move allows customers to utilize ambient AI assistants such as Nabla directly. With this integration, Nabla aims to assist clinicians in improving their efficiency and productivity in their daily tasks.

data.title: Catalyst Pharmaceuticals to present at upcoming scientific conferences, showcasing data on rare diseases.
data.description: Coral Gables, Florida, October 9, 2025 - Catalyst Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CPRX), a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to acquiring, developing, and marketing innovative treatments for rare and challenging medical conditions, revealed its plans to showcase research findings at various scientific gatherings. The company will share data at multiple upcoming conferences to contribute to the scientific community's knowledge. This initiative aims to provide insight into their efforts towards enhancing treatment options for individuals grappling with uncommon and refractory illnesses.

data.title: Starburst launches AI-Ready Data Platform to empower enterprises with unified AI agents and metadata.
data.description: Today, in New York City on October 9, 2025, Starburst introduced the initial lakehouse platform to combine AI agents, governed data products, and metadata. This innovation aims to empower enterprises to expand AI capabilities while maintaining confidence. The announcement was made at AI & Datanova, highlighting a fresh range of solutions for context-aware businesses looking to scale AI effectively.

data.title: Filippo Berio rebrands with a premium look after 158 years, emphasizing legacy & global leadership in olive oil.
data.description: A well-established brand with a 158-year history has updated its visual identity while still maintaining key elements that showcase its position as a top producer of premium olive oil. Recently unveiled in Lyndhurst, New Jersey on October 9, 2025, Filippo Berio, a globally recognized olive oil company, continues to uphold its tradition while adapting to modern standards.

data.title: Americans lost $15.7 billion to porch pirates in 2024, with 241 million packages stolen. 1 in 3 households affected, $6.5 billion loss for retailers.
data.description: Research conducted by Omnisend reveals that approximately 1 in every 3 households in the United States has experienced package theft. This has resulted in retailers facing substantial losses, estimated at around $6.5 billion in refunds. The study, which incorporated FBI crime data and a consumer survey, highlights the significant impact of package theft on both households and businesses. The findings emphasize the urgent need for enhanced security measures to address this prevalent issue in the e-commerce sector.

data.title: Opill collaborates with Chillhouse, launching 'Opill and Chill', donating one Opill pack for each set sold. #Perrigo #PRGO #NYBCAP #Opill
data.description: Brands based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, have pledged to contribute one pack of Opill® to the NY Birth Control Access Project for every Opill®-themed Chill Tips set sold. Perrigo Company plc (NYSE: PRGO), a prominent provider of Consumer Self-Care Products, revealed this initiative on October 9, 2025. The company is committed to supporting this cause by donating a portion of their sales to benefit the project.
